situation_read: Stärkste Dynamik nach Gate-Recheck: “hashicorp/terraform” — Die Dynamik liegt über Normalniveau und verdient aktive Beobachtung. Band=strong, score=25.0.
how_to_use: Treat dynamic_band as comparative motion, not factual certainty.
Single-source AI is capped unless AXI0M/User-Yps relevance or official incident evidence exists.
Security high-signal terms outrank AI hype when exposure could matter.

top_dynamics.summary: Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.
